hero.desc: The professional tool for batch rendering video files. Queue, automate, and process hundreds of files — while you sleep.

items.title: Setting up your first batch queue

items.text: BatchRender cut my overnight render queue from 8 hours to 40 minutes. I genuinely cannot work without it now.
items.name: Marcus H.

items.text: Finally a batch renderer that just works. Setup took 5 minutes and the GPU acceleration is a game changer.
items.name: Sarah K.

items.text: We use BatchRender across our whole studio. The team licensing and scheduled jobs are exactly what we needed.
items.name: Dmitri R.

items.a: BatchRender runs on Windows 10/11 (64-bit). macOS support is planned for Q3 2025.

items.q: Is this a subscription or one-time purchase?
items.a: One-time purchase. Pay once, use forever. Free updates are included for the period specified in your plan.

items.q: Can I use it on multiple computers?
items.a: Yes — Starter allows 1 machine, Professional 2 machines, Studio 5 machines. You can transfer a license by deactivating it on one machine.
Input: MP4, MOV, MKV, AVI, WMV, FLV, WebM and more. Output depends on installed codecs and your settings.

items.q: Do I need a powerful GPU?
items.a: GPU acceleration is optional. BatchRender works on any machine, but a compatible NVIDIA, Intel or AMD GPU will significantly speed up rendering.
We offer a full 30-day money-back guarantee. Contact support@batchrender.com within 30 days of purchase.

items.q: 这是订阅制还是一次性购买？
items.a: 一次性购买。付款一次，永久使用。免费更新包含在您的计划指定期限内。

items.q: 可以在多台电脑上使用吗？
items.a: 是的——入门版1台，专业版2台，工作室版5台。您可以通过在一台设备上停用来转移授权。
输入：MP4、MOV、MKV、AVI、WMV、FLV、WebM等。输出取决于已安装的编解码器和您的设置。
GPU加速是可选的。BatchRender可在任何机器上运行，但兼容的NVIDIA、Intel或AMD GPU将显著加快渲染速度。
